feed.title: Memedroid
feed.subtitle: Trending memes from memedroid.com (no native feed; scraped from the server-rendered homepage).

entry.title: Remember when I predicted the Democrats would sabotage it ?
What kind of game are we playing with ourselves
It's illegal for poll workers to ask for ID and it's legal for any non-citizen to vote. And this makes sense to Democrats.
You chose that man though. Always need that attention too
"Billions of people living their lives, oblivious."
Global warming is caused by muslim immigrants confirmed
Nobody asked for this, please just stop
I think too much makeup over years clogs the pores
Why do they get to have all the fun?
Country homes take me roads, to the belong I placed, west Mama country Virginia. Take me roads country home
The Lunitics have taken over the Asylum
Crocs denied free meal by cruel staff
Special persons day would be for special needs tards
UN Food Program REJECTED Elon Musk's $6B to eliminate world hunger
Dreams never survive contact with reality
Hats off to these young men
damn Jeremy Clarkson has the cancer
What five year old me thought my pikachu would look like after hyper training it
She spoke for all the drivers
entry.content: She spoke for all the drivers

entry.title: Is it hatred or merely population control?
How about a story about an MMA event on the Whitehouse lawn
How do you like dem apples?
